Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CONSUMER AFFAIRS AND PROTECTION

Title: Enacts the "honesty in cut meat act"
Summary: Enacts the "honesty in cut meat act" under which grocery stores must display signage that distinguishes between store-cut meat and pre-cut, pre-packaged meat.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to enacting the "honesty in cut meat act"
